basic_details.job_title: AIIMS CAPFIMS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 18 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), New Delhi
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), New Delhi has released a recruitment notification for Assistant Professor posts in 2026. The organisation invites online applications from eligible candidates for various Assistant Professor positions on a contract basis at AIIMS-CAPFIMS Campus, Maidangarhi, New Delhi.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 06-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 20-07-2026 up to 05:00 PM

application_fee.details: For General / OBC Candidates: Rs. 3000/- For EWS Candidates: Rs. 2400/- For SC / ST Candidates: Rs. 2400/- (Refundable for candidates appearing in interview) For PwBD Candidates: Exempted

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 Years Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government of India rules. SC/ST: 5 Years relaxation OBC: 3 Years relaxation PwBD: 5 Years relaxation

qualification.education_qualification: MD / MS / D.M. / M.Ch. / Equivalent Medical Qualification

selection_process: Screening of Applications Shortlisting of Candidates Personal Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Visit the official AIIMS recruitment website.
Register using a valid email ID and mobile number.
Fill in the application form with correct details.
Upload required educational certificates, experience documents and photographs.
Pay the application fee as applicable.
Submit the online application form before the last date.
Keep a printout of the application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS CAPFIMS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Overview

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Starting Date for Apply Online: 06-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 20-07-2026 up to 05:00 PM

content_sections.heading: AIIMS CAPFIMS Assistant Professor Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: AIIMS New Delhi has announced vacancies for Assistant Professor posts in various medical specialties. The post-wise vacancy details are given below:

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for AIIMS CAPFIMS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates having the required medical qualifications and experience can apply for AIIMS CAPFIMS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026. The eligibility details are as follows: Medical Qualification: Candidates should possess a medical qualification included in Schedule I & II or Part II of the Third Schedule of the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956. Gastroenterology / Medical Oncology / Nephrology Posts: Candidates should possess D.M. in the concerned specialty or equivalent qualification after MBBS as required. Neurosurgery / Urology Posts: Candidates should possess M.Ch. in the concerned specialty or equivalent qualification. Nuclear Medicine: Candidates should possess MD in Nuclear Medicine or equivalent qualification. Orthopedics: Candidates should possess MS in Orthopedics or equivalent qualification. Experience: Teaching and/or research experience in the concerned specialty from recognised institutions is required as per post.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS CAPFIMS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 50 Years Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government of India rules. SC/ST: 5 Years relaxation OBC: 3 Years relaxation PwBD: 5 Years relaxation

content_sections.heading: AIIMS CAPFIMS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: For General / OBC Candidates: Rs. 3000/- For EWS Candidates: Rs. 2400/- For SC / ST Candidates: Rs. 2400/- (Refundable for candidates appearing in interview) For PwBD Candidates: Exempted

content_sections.heading: AIIMS CAPFIMS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Screening of Applications Shortlisting of Candidates Personal Interview Document Verification

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for AIIMS CAPFIMS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official AIIMS recruitment website. Open the online application link. Register using a valid email ID and mobile number. Fill in the application form with correct details. Upload required educational certificates, experience documents and photographs. Pay the application fee as applicable. Submit the online application form before the last date. Keep a printout of the application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the full form of AIIMS CAPFIMS?
faq.answer: AIIMS CAPFIMS stands for All India Institute of Medical Sciences - Central Armed Police Forces Institute of Medical Sciences

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in AIIMS CAPFIMS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: AIIMS CAPFIMS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 has announced a total of 18 vacancies for various medical specialties.

faq.question: Q3. What is the post name in AIIMS CAPFIMS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name is Assistant Professor in various disciplines including Gastroenterology, Medical Oncology, Nephrology, Neurosurgery, Nuclear Medicine, Orthopedics and Urology.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for AIIMS CAPFIMS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess the required medical qualification such as MD, MS, D.M., M.Ch. or equivalent qualification in the concerned specialty as per the post requirement.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for AIIMS CAPFIMS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Assistant Professor posts is 50 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for AIIMS CAPFIMS Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,42,506/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for AIIMS CAPFIMS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: General/OBC candidates have to pay Rs. 3000/-, EWS and SC/ST candidates have to pay Rs. 2400/-, while PwBD candidates are exempted from the application fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for AIIMS CAPFIMS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes screening of applications, shortlisting of candidates, personal interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS CAPFIMS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 20 July 2026 up to 05:00 PM.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for AIIMS CAPFIMS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official website is https://www.aiims.edu.
